raw.subject: Your Wilmington page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you offer sharpening services for dog clippers at Dog Gone Dirty Sharp, and I'm impressed by the attention to detail you bring to pet care in Wilmington.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for pet owners to book your services directly.

I took a look at your Facebook posts and photos, and I sketched out a simple homepage idea that highlights your services and showcases your beautiful work.

You can see the idea here: https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/dog-gone-dirty-mobile-dog-grooming-wilmington

This is just a starting point, but I think it gives a good sense of what you could do with a simple website.

Building something like this is a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses.

I'd be happy to discuss details over a quick call or reply to this email to get started.
